title: Terraria + Calamity OST Mix
description: A mixture of the soundtracks from Terraria and Calamity.
body:
This resource pack replaces Minecraft's original soundtrack with a mix of tracks from both Terraria and the Calamity Mod. It’s designed to enhance gameplay with more variety while staying true to the game’s atmosphere. Ideal for players who want a familiar yet refreshed audio experience.

(Yes, the icon is a parody of this resource pack's icon: [link](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/terraria-soundtrack))
